<!-- image -->

Number of outbreaks per week 01/09/2025 to 20/01/2026 is shown in a bar chart. The x-axis measures weeks in 2025. The y-axis measures number of outbreaks. The number of outbreaks per week has been increasing since 2019.

## Summary

- HPAI Peak appears to have been overcome:
- Number of cases in wild birds are declining significantly
- Number of cases in poultry decreased since last PAFF
- Situation is under control, no chains of infection
- However risk assessment FLI (12/01/2026) still results in high risk

[https://www.fli.de/en/news/animal-disease-situation/avian-influenza-ai-fowl-plague/](https://www.fli.de/en/news/animal-disease-situation/avian-influenza-ai-fowl-plague/)

- Conclusion: Awareness and biosecurity still of high importance

<!-- image -->
